positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for pos.tptp
1. ! [X0] : (publishes(new_vessel_press,X0) => in_english(X0)) [input(axiom)]
2. publishes(new_vessel_press,neapolitan_chronicles) [input(axiom)]
5. in_english(neapolitan_chronicles) [input(conjecture)]
6. ~in_english(neapolitan_chronicles) [negated conjecture 5]
7. ~in_english(neapolitan_chronicles) [flattening 6]
9. ! [X0] : (in_english(X0) | ~publishes(new_vessel_press,X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
10. ~publishes(new_vessel_press,X0) | in_english(X0) [cnf transformation 9]
11. publishes(new_vessel_press,neapolitan_chronicles) [cnf transformation 2]
13. ~in_english(neapolitan_chronicles) [cnf transformation 7]
14. in_english(neapolitan_chronicles) [resolution 10,11]
16. $false [forward subsumption resolution 14,13]
% SZS output end Proof for pos.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
